#+TITLE: The Test Play
#+AUTHOR: Test Author
#+STARTUP: showeverything

* Characters
| ALICE   | The optimist.  |
| BOB     | The pessimist. |
| CHARLIE | The realist.   |

* ACT I
** Scene 1: The Room
*** A room. Morning. Empty except for a chair.
**** ALICE
Good morning.
**** BOB
Is it.
*** ALICE sits down.
**** ALICE
I think so.
**** BOB (sarcastically)
Wonderful.

** Scene 2: The Garden
*** The garden. Afternoon.
**** ALICE
Much better out here.
**** BOB
If you say so.
*** CHARLIE enters carrying an umbrella.
**** CHARLIE
It's going to rain.
**** ALICE
It always rains.
**** CHARLIE
That's the spirit.
